privileged_info_summary: This task simulates a Jitsi VideoBridge restart and documents client auto-reconnection behavior. The verified paths are /home/ga/reconnecting_state.png and /home/ga/restored_state.png where agents must capture screenshots of the error and restored states. The meeting room name is 'ResilienceTest', the Jitsi installation directory is /home/ga/jitsi, and the video bridge service container is named 'jvb'. The task uses real Jitsi infrastructure with actual Docker containers (web, prosody, jicofo, jvb services) running on localhost:8080.
